title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 suffer worst day of year as AI stocks tumble and Fed rate-hike odds rise
author: John Towfighi
summary: Dow -695 (-1.35%) to 50,866.78; S&P 500 -200.57 (-2.64%) to 7,383.74; Nasdaq -1,121.53 (-4.18%) to 25,709.43. Worst day since Oct for SPX, since April 2025 for Nasdaq. 172K jobs added vs 80K expected. CME FedWatch: 43% chance of rate hike in Dec. 10Y at 4.54%. VIX surged 40%. NVDA -6.2%, AVGO -7.9%, INTC -11.3%, Bitcoin below $60K, gold -3.5% erasing all 2026 gains.

title: Stock Market News for June 5, 2026: Nasdaq Suffers Worst Week in More Than a Year
author: Caitlin McCabe, Aaron Lucchetti
summary: Nasdaq -4.2%, worst week since April 2025. 2Y yield at 4.16% (highest in a year). 70% chance of Fed hike by year-end vs <50% pre-jobs. Micron, Marvell, Intel, AMD, Qualcomm, ARM all down 10%+. Trump posted 'Growth does not mean inflation!' SPX ended 9-week winning streak.

title: Weekly Trader's Stock Market Outlook
author: Nathan Peterson, Jim Ferraioli
summary: Largest one-day drop of 2026. SPX rallied 20.6% from March 30 to Tuesday ATH without pullback. SpaceX IPO next Friday (~$1.77T valuation) may cause pre-IPO selling. Alphabet $85B equity raise, Meta may follow. Bitcoin -20% weekly, below 200W SMA. SOX at 20-day SMA test. Forecast: Higher Volatility. WWDC Monday, CPI/PPI Wed/Thu key.

title: Stock Market Today, June 5: Strong Jobs Data Drives Broad Sell-Off at Midday
author: Emma Newbery
summary: NVDA -5.93% to $205.70, AMD -11.01% to $465.59, MU -12.36% to $872.94, AVGO -7.49% to $387.52, TSLA -6.4% to $391.53, META -5.5% to $593.00, MSFT -2.5% to $417.15, AAPL -1.1% to $307.88. 70% probability of rate hike by December.

title: S&P 500, Nasdaq Fall as Chip Sell-Off Deepens
author: David Kesiena
summary: 172K jobs vs consensus 80K. 10Y above 4.5%, 30Y above 5%. ~60% chance of rate increase by end-2026. South Korea Kospi -5%+ (Samsung, SK Hynix). ASML and Infineon fell sharply. Brent ~mid-$90s. Marine fuel shortages could idle 10% of global shipping by late summer. Warsh's first FOMC mid-June.

title: Markets News: June 5, 2026 — Nasdaq Ends Day 4% Lower
author: Aaron Rennie
summary: SPX -2.6% (weekly and daily), Nasdaq -4.7% weekly. 10Y at 4.55%. WTI -2.9% to $90.35, Brent -2% to $93.09, Gold -3.6% to $4,345, DXY +0.6% to 100.04. Only 4 of 73 S&P 500 IT components positive. INTC still +180% YTD. MSTR -11%, HOOD -10%, COIN -7% on crypto rout.

title: June 2026 Market Update: Stocks and inflation keep rising
author: Steve Lowe CFA
summary: CPI 3.8% YoY (highest since 2024), PPI 6.0% YoY, Core PCE 3.3% YoY. Consumer sentiment 44.8 record low. Savings rate 2.6%. Real disposable income -0.5% MoM. Thrivent overweight equities vs FI, favor large-caps, overweight long-duration Treasuries as hedge. Base case: 'prolonged' Middle East conflict.

title: FX Outlook for June 2026: inflation and resilience collide
author: Convera Research
summary: USD structurally supported by growth resilience, rate differentials, and persistent inflation. Late-stage equilibrium: equities near highs but vulnerable to repricing. Three forces: persistent inflation, rising global bond yields, resilient risk sentiment. US-Iran geopolitical developments key for energy/inflation.

title: Monthly Currency Outlook — June 2026
author: Monex USA Research
summary: USD +<0.5% in May. JPY -1.4% despite $73.6B record intervention. ECB June 11: 25bp hike 98.2% probability. RBNZ looking to hike (83.2% July odds). Fed June 17: Warsh's first meeting. Stagflation signal: CPI 3.2%, GDP revised to 1.6%. Strait of Hormuz escalation treated as persistent by market.

title: Stock Market Today: Dow, Nasdaq, S&P 500 Down; Broadcom Falls
author: Barron's Staff
summary: Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq all finished lower after May jobs report. Broadcom among biggest decliners following weak guidance.

title: Tech stocks today: Nvidia stock drops 6% in ugly day for chip stocks
author: Yahoo Finance Staff
summary: NVDA -6.20% to $205.10. Google to pay SpaceX $920M/month to rent 110,000 NVDA GPUs from Oct 2026-Jun 2029. Broad weakness across semiconductor sector.

title: Fed Funds Target Range — Upper Limit (DFEDTARU)
author: Board of Governors
summary: Current Fed funds rate upper limit: 3.75% as of June 6, 2026. Interest on reserve balances: 3.65%.

title: FOMC Minutes — April 29, 2026
author: FOMC
summary: Committee voted unanimously to maintain federal funds rate at 3.65% on reserve balances. Minutes from the meeting that Jerome Powell chaired before Kevin Warsh took over.

title: US Dollar — DXY exchange rate and historical data
summary: DXY at 100.0680 on June 5, +0.66% on session. +2.09% over past month, +0.89% over 12 months.
